case_title: TIFANI FUENTES VS. YOURMECHANIC, INC. WHICH WILL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUENTES, TIFANI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YOURMECHANIC, INC. WHICH WILL DBA YOURMECHANIC SERVICES, INC.
